RESPONSES.self_intro: Hello! My name is Dora. I am a Python-based personal assistant.
RESPONSES.confirm_user_prompt: Starting up... Hello, {USERNAME}! Is that you? Say yes or no.
RESPONSES.confirm_user_new_confirm: Did I hear that correctly, your name is {new_name}? Yes or no?
RESPONSES.confirm_user_retry_name: Sorry, please say your name again.
RESPONSES.music_folder_missing: I can't find the music folder named '{folder}'.
RESPONSES.music_file_not_found: There are no music files in the folder.
RESPONSES.tt_manager_already_running: The TeamTalk manager is already running.
RESPONSES.tt_no_servers_configured: There are no servers configured for monitoring.
RESPONSES.tt_manager_not_running: The TeamTalk manager is not even running.
RESPONSES.tt_monitoring_started: {count} TeamTalk monitors started in the background.
RESPONSES.tt_monitoring_stopped: All TeamTalk monitors have been stopped.
RESPONSES.available_commands: The available commands are as follows: {commands}
RESPONSES.time_signal_prompt: Alright. How often should I announce the time? 1, every quarter, 2, every half hour, 3, every hour.
RESPONSES.time_signal_started: Time signal set for every {interval} minutes.
RESPONSES.time_signal_stopped: The time signal has been stopped.
RESPONSES.time_signal_already_running: The time signal is already active.
RESPONSES.time_signal_not_running: The time signal was not running.
RESPONSES.tt_active_server_none: No active server is set. Please select one first with the 'switch server' command.
RESPONSES.tt_active_server_error: Error, the active server ({server}) is no longer running.
RESPONSES.tt_active_server_switched: Okay, the active server is now: {server}
RESPONSES.tt_no_users_in_channel: There is no one in the channel to send a message to.
RESPONSES.tt_send_pm_prompt: Who are you sending the message to? {users_list}
RESPONSES.tt_send_pm_prompt_message: Alright. What should the message be for {recipient}?
RESPONSES.tt_channel_message_prompt: What should I write to the channel?
RESPONSES.tt_user_not_found_on_active: I couldn't find a user named '{user}' on the active server.
RESPONSES.tt_users_in_channel: The following users are in the channel: {users_list}
RESPONSES.tt_disconnected_new_active: Disconnected. The new active server is: {server}
RESPONSES.gui_action_failed: Sorry, I couldn't perform that action.
RESPONSES.shutdown_confirm: Are you sure you want to shut down the computer?
RESPONSES.shutdown_initiated: Shutting down the computer in 10 seconds.
RESPONSES.restart_confirm: Are you sure you want to restart the computer?
RESPONSES.notification_error: Telegram is not configured. Set your token and chat ID in the configurator.
RESPONSES.chatbot_start: Chatbot mode started. Say exit to stop.
RESPONSES.chatbot_error: Sorry, the AI service is not responding.
